default.summary: This proposal is designed to make the decision easy: clear scope, clear pricing, clear differences between each tier, and a direct path to the right next step.
default.tier1desc: For brands that need the core strategy and assets done right.
default.tier2desc: For brands that want strategy plus hands-on momentum.
default.tier3desc: For brands that want full-force strategic and execution support.

lovato-lending.objective: Build a predictable mortgage lead engine
lovato-lending.summary: This proposal outlines the three ways Ventura can help Lovato Lending scale with clear pricing, clear deliverables, and a faster path to qualified lead volume.
lovato-lending.tier1desc: For getting the core message, funnel, and growth foundation in place.
lovato-lending.tier2desc: For deeper execution support and more aggressive lead-generation momentum.
lovato-lending.tier3desc: For full-force growth execution, creative, optimization, and strategic oversight.

tanzzz.objective: Launch Tanzzz with high-converting product photography and video assets for Amazon, Shopify, and social.
tanzzz.timeline: 2-5 weeks depending on selected package and final product delivery
tanzzz.summary: Tanzzz solves a real problem spray tan users know too well: waiting hours for a tan to develop while it stains sheets, rubs off on clothes, and leaves a mess behind. This proposal is built to turn the product from
into a clearly differentiated product with visuals that show exactly why it matters.
tanzzz.tier1desc: Core product photography for Amazon and Shopify plus a basic product handling video for launch-ready storefront visuals.
tanzzz.tier2desc: Everything in Tier 1 plus lifestyle video and expanded product photography for a full multi-channel launch.
tanzzz.tier3desc: Everything in Tier 2 plus extended storytelling video, full product photography suite, and content variations for scale.
